'''Inntak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Biography==
A member of the dominant [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]]—though with little clan loyalty—he only took bounties for rogue Rodians and those that had angered [[Navik/Legends|Navik the Red]].<ref name="guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

Leading a group of five other hunters, Inntak was tasked to follow secretly the [[Rodian Galactic Drama Troupe]] as they performed off-world; [[actor/Legends|actress]] [[Entukan Yesosko]], leader of the [[Rodian Galactic Drama Troupe]], secretly informed him of the Troupe's schedule and whenever wanted Rodians attended their performances. Inntak and his hunters occasionally scouted the crowd.<ref name="guide" />

Some members of the Troupe were aware of this behind-the-scenes operation, and tried to sabotage it.<ref name="guide" />

Sometimes Inntak hired non-Rodian hunters in case the bounty could have been suspicious or warned; or if his team were busy with other business.<ref name="guide" /> Indeed, one time when the Troupe was about to give their final performance of a tour in [[Iskaayuma/Legends|Iskaayuma]], they sold two thousand tickets to select beings, and Inntak knew that they would include some hidden survivors of the [[Roolek clan]]; however Inntak was busy with another hunt and let word in several worlds that he saught hunters for hire. He received candidates and presented the job as a routine bounty, without mentioning the wider politics. Before leaving, he instructed them not to disrupt the play, and collect their bounty only away from the arena, and gave them a [[comlink/Legends|comm]] number. The case eventually led to the discovery of the [[Rodmark Weapons Plant/Legends|Rodmark Weapons Plant]] as a Roolek stronghold, about which Inntak would be willing to pay a big reward.<ref name="drama">{{WEGCite|story=Street Drama|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}}</ref>
